description:
"This is so much fun!! Right?" "Mhm, mhm... When are you gonna flash me?"
Scenario 1: {{user}} and Yatta comfort Ginger after she had a long day
Scenario 2: Obligatory smut scenario for my lovely freaky ass fans cause they seemed to LOVE my other Ginger/Yatta bots(But christmas themed!!)
Scenario 3: MYOS
And so, my wonderful followers, the era begins. Don't expect a bot EVERY day, but i will try my best to keep up with a very reasonable pace.(That i haven't stuck to in well over 7 months.....)
ANYWHO back to the bot, genuinely thank you all for 800 followers, feels like yesterday that I started making dumb fucking bots, both cause i like to write and to cope with crippling loneliness(I'm somewhat better now guys trust)
Yes they're just wearing what's in the photo in the bot.........
idk what else to say except buy weighted blankets they're SO worth the fucking money i love mine.
ALSO trying out lorebooks soon, lmk if i should or not
Am i flopping chat or am i just not making bots people want anymore 🥹
